name: Sticker Book Puzzle
author: Poki
description: Sticker Book Puzzle is a creative puzzle game where your imagination brings pictures to life! Turn black and white pages into colorful masterpieces by placing each vibrant sticker in its perfect spot. Solve each puzzle, complete charming scenes, and fill your entire book with beautiful sticker creations. Can you complete every page and become the ultimate sticker master? How to play Sticker Book Puzzle? Click and hold to move the sticker, release to drop the stricker on the page. Who created Sticker Book Puzzle? Sticker Book Puzzle is created by Lion Studios. Play their other games on Poki: Family Tree! , Mr Bullet , Love Balls and Happy Glass ! How can I play Sticker Book Puzzle for free? You can play Sticker Book Puzzle for free on Poki. Can I play Sticker Book Puzzle on mobile devices and desktop? Sticker Book Puzzle can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
